description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brown exterior and white trim, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns. The house has a gable roof with dormer windows on the upper level and a large attached garage on one side. The front yard is paved with a driveway and landscaped with small trees and shrubs, while the backyard is enclosed by a white fence and includes a swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is bordered by fencing on all sides, ensuring privacy and separation from neighboring lots. The overall design is reminiscent of American Colonial Revival architecture, blending traditional and modern suburban elements.
description: A two-story brown house with white trim, a gable roof, dormer windows, a front porch with columns, and an attached garage. The property features a paved driveway, landscaped front yard, fenced backyard with a pool, and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with porch, columns, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the backyard with a pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, patio, and rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, and the side of the house with the garage and driveway visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, supported by white columns, and flanked by steps and decorative landscaping.
